blocks.content: ⚠️ **Critical Opening Tip:** The guest character with the highest Link EXP (must be Level 3) will give you a powerful accessory during the opening sequence. This is determined by your choices in Act 1.

blocks.heading: Guest Character Accessories
rows: Attacks/Crafts can cancel arts (90% chance), Delay +6

blocks.content: 💡 **Resource Management:** From now on, spend mira and sepith only on the four characters you intend to bring to the Act boss. Swap equipment and quartz among support characters so they gain experience without extra expense. When the story requires specific characters, transfer their armor, boots, and quartz. Save as much mira and sepith as possible.

blocks.heading: December 15: Exploring the Courageous
blocks.content:
The **Courageous** airship is your new base of operations. Explore the ship and visit all locations marked with **red exclamation marks**. On the **1st Floor**, speak to **George** and **Valimar**—after this event, Rean can use **Spirit Unification** at the cost of 100 CP. Head to the **2nd Floor Cafeteria** and speak to **Millium** for a short scene. Play the **Blade Mini Game** in the leisure room; win or lose, the first 5 rounds each give 100 Link EXP. Visit **Princess Alfin** in the **Royal Room** on the 4th Floor.

After exploring, read the quest list at the computer terminal on the Bridge. **Gaius** is mandatory for your party. Speak to **Towa** to begin recruiting missing students. Destinations available: Ymir, Proving Ground, Garrelia Fortress, Nord Highlands, Legram.

checkpoints.label: Explored the Courageous and triggered all events

blocks.heading: Courageous Facilities Guide
blocks.content:
Not all facilities are available immediately—recruit Thors Academy students to unlock them.

**5F — Bridge:** Computer Terminal (quest hub, reporting, student intel) and Captain Towa (party management, destinations, story progression).
**4F — Assembly Area:** Royal Room (speak to Alfin for Phoenix Chapter medals based on achievements) and Training Facility (fight enemies for U-Materials and Master Quartz).
**3F — Shop Area:** Weapon/Item Shop (Casper), Accessory Shop (Colette), Premium Products (Hugo), Radio Sweepstakes (Munk, lottery system), Recipe Gift (offer recipes to Bridget for rewards).
**2F — Cafeteria:** Club activities (Fishing, Literature, etc.) and Blade Mini Game (Link EXP for first 5 rounds).
**1F — Engineering:** Synthesize quartz with George. Hangar for Orbal Bike customization (later: Clara unlocks EX-Orb function for Valimar).

blocks.heading: Proving Ground (Garrelia Camp)
blocks.content: Select **Proving Ground** from the world map (middle right). Bring **Laura** in your party. At the **Store Area**, speak to **Monica** to recruit her—she'll appear on the Courageous 3rd Floor afterward, where offering her Supreme Dishes earns item rewards (cook every Supreme Dish for a rare quartz). At the **Center of Camp**, speak to **Rex** to add his profile to the Notebook. Find **Officer Virginie** by the truck to learn the **Tomato Burger** recipe. Finally, head to the **Headquarters** (East Exit) and speak to **General Craig** to start the side quest.

checkpoints.label: Learned Tomato Burger recipe from Virginie

blocks.name: Without Leave
blocks.content:
Speak to General Craig at the Headquarters to accept. Gather info from NPCs marked with **green exclamation marks**: the lunch table (southeast corner), clerks in the resting area, and clerks in the store area. After gathering intel, speak to the soldier near the **west gate exit**, then head to **Garrelia Fortress - Ruins**.

At the ruins (no monsters—use the **Orbal Bike** with Square button), speak to soldiers near the tank on the west side (near Garrelia Byroad exit). Head to the east end near the **crater** to trigger an event and complete the quest.

**Treasure Chests in Area:** Adamant Shield (Garrelia Fortress), Sepith Mass x400, Crystal Flood.
**Trial Chest (Southwest Corner):** Defeat Huge Rat & Dirty Rats to unlock **Overdrive** for **Fie** and **Sara**. Strategy: Use full CP and S-Crafts, or exploit their poor magic defense with Sara's Arts.

**Post-Quest:** A **Cryptid** (giant monster) appears near the crater. Recommended Level 100 (possible at 75+ with setup). Defeating it drops a special quartz for **Lost Arts**. Best to attempt on NG+ when Jusis is Lv 81 (Platinum Shield) or wait until all 5 Cryptids are available in Ch 2-3.

blocks.heading: Garrelia Byroad: Emily & Nicolas
blocks.content: Exit east to **Garrelia Byroad 2**, then travel to **Garrelia Byroad 1**. Head to the **northeast corner** (Trial Chest location) to find **Emily** and **Nicolas**. Recruit them and help install the **relay machine**—there are 6 installation points total (3 on Byroad 1, 3 on Byroad 2). After placing all relays, report back to Emily and Nicolas, then return to the Courageous.

blocks.heading: Legram: Recruitment & Shopping
blocks.content: Return to the Courageous, speak to **Towa**, and set destination to **Legram** (bottom of map). At the **General Store**, buy **Imperial Chronicle Issue #4** and **Gambler Jack Reprint #8**. To recruit students: visit the **Chapel** (right room) and speak to **Vivi**—you need **Fie** in your party to convince her. At the **Training Hall** (left room), speak to **Casper**—you need **Imperial Chronicle Issue #4** to recruit him. Stop by the **Bracer Guild** for an event with Miles, then head to **Aprikoze Inn** to start the next side quest.

blocks.name: Badass in Danger!!!
blocks.content: Speak to the green-haired boy at Aprikoze Inn to start the quest. You need to find **Patiry** in **Ymir**—talk to **Luke**, the station guard by the pub, for his location. Return to the Courageous, travel to Ymir, and speak to Patiry near the station guard to complete the quest.

blocks.heading: Ymir Revisited
blocks.content: While in Ymir (Northern section of map), visit the **General Store** to buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #9** and learn the **Crunchy Rice Cracker** recipe. A new **Snowboard** course is available, and you can fish in Ymir Valley for additional catches.

blocks.heading: Zender Gate & Watchtower: Recruiting Mint
blocks.content:
Speak to Towa and set destination to **Zender Gate** (top right of map). Enter the gate and head north to find **Tank Officer Hoover**—he gives you **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 8**. Leave Zender Gate and find **Beryl** at the stone monument in the **northwest corner**. If you miss Beryl here, she appears in Legram (Dec 19) or Terra Shrine (Dec 23).

Use Quick Navigation to travel to the **Watchtower**. Speak to **Mint** (choose the first option to help), then examine all key points marked with red exclamation marks on every floor. Head to the **rooftop** for an event—Mint joins the Courageous crew afterward.

checkpoints.label: Obtained Gambler Jack II - Chapter 8 from Hoover

blocks.name: Find Our First Years
blocks.content:
Recruit all four students to complete this quest:
- **Monica** — Garrelia Proving Ground (Store Area)
- **Vivi** — Legram Chapel (requires Fie in party)
- **Casper** — Legram Training Hall (requires Imperial Chronicle #4)
- **Mint** — Watchtower (rooftop event)

Once all four are recruited, return to the Courageous Bridge (5F), access the Computer Terminal, and select the 2nd option to report completion.

blocks.heading: Lake Lacrima: Shopping & Monster Madness
blocks.content: Speak to Towa and set destination to **Lake Lacrima**. At the **General Store**, buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #7**. Find **Sheeda** and speak to her to learn the **Hearty Milk Hotpot** recipe. Then visit the **Cabin** and speak to **Elder Ivan** or **Gwen** to trigger the Monster Madness story quest. Head to **Nord Highlands - North** and find the quest monster near the fishing spot in the northeast area.

checkpoints.label: Learned Hearty Milk Hotpot recipe from Sheeda

blocks.name: Magic Knight Ortheim
blocks.heading: Story Quest Boss: Magic Knight Ortheim
blocks.strategy: Bring a full party for this fight. The Knight can heal itself, so you need to out-damage its recovery. When its HP gets low, spam **S-Crafts** immediately to finish it off before it can heal back up. Don't let the fight drag on—sustained burst damage is key. Reward: Sepith Mass x400, 2,500 Mira, 4 AP.

blocks.heading: Ancient Quarry Dungeon
blocks.content:
From **Nord Highlands - North**, use Quick Navigation to reach the **Ancient Quarry**. Grab the **EP Charge II** at the entrance. Speak to **Clara** (choose the first option) to begin exploring together.

At the **center path split**, find the Trial Chest—defeat **Alpha Diglem x2 & Diglem x4** to unlock **Overdrive** for Emma, Fie, Gaius, and Jusis. Continue to the **south end** (outside area) for the **Volcanic Rain** quartz. On the **north path**, a monster chest contains the **Pandora** Master Quartz. Collect **U-Materials** to the east. At the **north end**, the dungeon boss awaits.

blocks.name: Ginosha-Zanak
blocks.heading: Boss: Ginosha-Zanak (Ancient Quarry)

stats.Ginosha-Zanak: Giant Spider | Returning boss from CS1 (weakened) | Summons minions (max 4 at once)

blocks.strategy:
Status ailments are very effective—**Confused**, **Sleep**, and **Faint** all work well. Keep the minion count managed while focusing damage on the main body. With status locks applied, this fight is straightforward.

**Rewards:** Clara joins the Courageous. New features unlocked: **EX-Orb** function for Valimar and the **Awakener's Call** ability.
**New Game+ only:** Return to the boss area after the fight to find **Black Records #1**.

blocks.heading: Commencing the Operation
blocks.content: With all recruitment and dungeon content finished, return to the Courageous. Report status at the **Computer Terminal** on the Bridge (5F), then speak to **Towa** and select **"Commence Operation"** to advance to December 17th.
💡 **Nightmare Tip:** If you obtained Sharon's **Black Virtue** accessory, equip it on Rean permanently. Combined with Impede 1-2, it makes Arc Slash incredibly effective at canceling enemy arts.

blocks.heading: December 17: Twin Dragons Bridge
blocks.content: **Elliot** and **Sara** are mandatory party members for this segment. Choose your remaining slots carefully—there's no turning back after party selection. You immediately face a mech battle upon arriving.

blocks.name: Three Mechs (Spiegel, Hector, Drakkhen)
blocks.heading: Mech Battle: Three Mechs

stats.Spiegel (Spear): Stays in backlines and buffs. Forced to front when others die. Weakness: Body

blocks.strategy: Focus on defeating one mech at a time rather than splitting damage. The Spiegel hangs in the backlines buffing the others—kill Hector or Drakkhen first to force it forward. Save Brave Points and CP for the second unit. Keep your HP above 35k-40k and heal proactively.

blocks.heading: Twin Dragons Bridge Exploration
blocks.content:
After the mech battle, explore the bridge dungeon floor by floor.

**2F:** Right room has **EP Charge III**. From the center, take the west duct to find the **Flood** quartz (monster chest). Take the east path to a southwest duct for a **Curia Balm**, and continue east to the end for **Ebony Boots**. Head to the southeast corner to go upstairs.

**3F:** On the west side (via duct), check the second room for a **Tearal Balm**. In the southeast corner, break boxes to find the **Yggdrasil** quartz. At the center, the left treasure is an **Ebony Vest**. Take the right duct downstairs, then the east duct to return to 3F. North stairs lead to 4F.

**4F:** The north room has **Sepith x200**. Heal at the center point, then proceed to the boss.

blocks.name: Kaiser Doven B & Kaiser Doven R
blocks.heading: Boss: Kaiser Doven B & R
blocks.strategy: A straightforward fight. Use **Elliot's Resounding Beat** to keep the party healed. Wipe out summoned mobs immediately so they don't overwhelm you—once the adds are down, focus damage on the main bosses. With Elliot providing consistent healing, this shouldn't pose much threat.

blocks.heading: December 18: Celdic
blocks.content:
After clearing Twin Dragons Bridge, you arrive in **Celdic**. Head to the **Grand Market** and speak to **Gibson** (first shop, left side) to learn the **Comforting Cappuccino** recipe. Find **Cornette** (center) to buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #10**, and **Marco** (west end) for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 9**.

At the **West End House**, speak to **Becky** to recruit her (2 AP now, 1 AP later when she appears on the Courageous). Visit **Margot** at the Weathercock Inn and **Rosine** at the Chapel for free consumables.

Attend **bonding events** for Elliot, Emma, Jusis, Sara, and Towa to update their profiles. Character locations: Market Manager's House (Alfin), South End (Alisa), Grand Market (Elliot, Towa), West End (Emma, Jusis), Weathercock Inn (Fie, Laura, Sara), Weapon Shop (Machias), Chapel (Millium), Near Entrance (Gaius).

checkpoints.label: Learned Comforting Cappuccino recipe from Gibson
Obtained Gambler Jack II - Chapter 9 from Marco

blocks.heading: Ending Act 2 - Part 1
blocks.content: Once all activities, bonding events, and shopping are complete, take the **East Exit** of Celdic to end the day and trigger the AP tally. You need **36 total AP** for S-Rank.
